title: Monterey Kitchen, Butler’s Pantry & Wardrobe
summary: Multi-space joinery project in Monterey combining kitchen work, butler’s pantry storage and wardrobe joinery.
heroAlt: Monterey joinery project with kitchen, butler’s pantry and wardrobe storage
overview: This Monterey project is one of the clearer examples of a multi-room joinery brief being resolved as one coherent scope. Rather than treating the kitchen, pantry and bedroom storage as unrelated upgrades, the project carries one finish direction and one level of detailing across the spaces.

afterImages.alt: Monterey kitchen joinery and island detail
afterImages.caption: Completed kitchen joinery in Monterey with a larger working bench and cleaner cabinetry.
Butler’s pantry shelving and storage detail from the Monterey project.
Wardrobe storage detail from the Monterey fitout showing the broader scope beyond the kitchen.
Integrated storage finish from the Monterey joinery project.
Cabinetry and benchtop detail from the completed Monterey fitout.
View showing how the Monterey kitchen and pantry joinery connect.

spaces.title: Kitchen & pantry
spaces.text: Kitchen cabinetry was supported by extra pantry storage so the finished joinery works as one connected scope rather than separate pieces.

spaces.title: Wardrobes
spaces.text: Wardrobe joinery kept the bedroom storage aligned with the same premium finish direction used elsewhere in the home.

outcome: The result feels more cohesive because the kitchen, pantry and wardrobe joinery all read as part of one considered fitout instead of isolated room updates.
ctaText: If you are planning a multi-room joinery project in Monterey or Bayside, send through your scope and we can help shape the right next step.
